title: Old Debug Screen
description: This mod restores the old debug screen (Old F3 Menu) that was changed in version 1.21.9.
body:
This mod restores the old debug screen from Minecraft, which was changed in version 1.21.9. The update removed some features that players found useful for debugging and gameplay. This mod brings back those original features for a more informative experience.

## Before
![Before Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/anLreFUK/images/a73336eb7586a44de67bd712bb73813b7f165d71_350.webp)

## After
